title: Built Two Unicorns in 12 Years. The Rule Has Never Changed | Glean, Arvind Jain
summary: Arvind Jain founded Glean, now a $7 billion company, by recognizing an internal problem where his team struggled to find information and answer questions efficiently. His competitive advantage came from focused execution and strategic focus rather than larger models or superior fundraising, embodying a philosophy of building only what others were not already doing well.
